name: codexmux
description: Delegate bounded dispatcher work to tm-managed Codex teammates.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate dispatcher work to tm teammates
interface.longDescription: Codexmux teaches a dreamux dispatcher how to call the pinned tm CLI, spawn a teammate in an explicit repo, wait for the result, and report failures without adding server-owned teammate state.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use codexmux when dispatcher work should be delegated to a tm teammate.
